# PHIL.109 ? Regret Minimization Framework

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** decision_making
**Subcategory:** regret_minimization_framework
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Choose paths that minimize long-term regret

## Application
Project forward to end of life, imagine looking back, identify what would cause regret, act accordingly
